# Claude Command Matrix

Generated from `config/claude_command_registry.yaml`. Every governed Claude
slash command is an **adapter only** — authority lives in the harness scripts
and gates listed below, never in the command itself.

| Command | Purpose | Authority Source | Script / Fallback | Mutates State? | Required Gates | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `/go` | Start highest-priority approved work through harness orchestration | `queue_orchestrator` | `scripts/go_mode.py` | Conditional | confidence, lease, verifier_if_t3, queue | Allowed |
| `/audit` | Run or summarize health, drift, and release-readiness checks | `harness_health` | `scripts/harness_health_check.py` / `scripts/release_readiness.py` | No (by default) | — | Allowed |
| `/status` | Summarize current harness state from existing artifacts | `read_only_artifacts` | `scripts/harness_health_check.py` | No | — | Allowed |
| `/ship` | Plan or execute shipping through confidence-gated git pipeline | `workflow_git` | `scripts/workflow_git.py` | Conditional | confidence, verifier, tests, collision, ci | Allowed |
| `/recover` | Inspect and recover stalled work, stale leases, or duplicate artifacts | `recovery_policy` | `scripts/emergency_recovery.py` / `scripts/lease_manager.py` | Inspect by default | human_for_mutation | Allowed |
| `/queue` | Read or import queue state through approved queue tooling | `bd_queue` | `bd` / `scripts/next_work.py` | Conditional | queue_policy | Allowed |
| `/explain` | Explain existing artifacts and decisions to the human | `read_only_artifacts` | — | No | — | Allowed |

## Forbidden Logic Guardrails

Each command declares logic it may **never** implement (enforced by
`scripts/validate_claude_adapter_policy.py` against `claude_adapter_rules.yaml`).

| Command | Forbidden Logic |
|---|---|
| `/go` | direct_file_mutation, direct_ship, hidden_agent_dispatch |
| `/audit` | approval_decision, release_override |
| `/status` | state_mutation, queue_claim |
| `/ship` | direct_merge, skip_tests, skip_verifier, skip_collision |
| `/recover` | force_delete, unapproved_override |
| `/queue` | arbitrary_reprioritization, hidden_claim |
| `/explain` | decision_override |
